projectDescription: A mobile puzzle game where players sort and match fashion goods on shelves to earn real cash rewards, redeemable via Cash App, PayPal, Amazon, Walmart, DoorDash, Target, and LEGO gift cards.
keyFeatures: Real cash earnings displayed in-game ($471.04 balance shown)
Cash Out button for instant reward redemption
Props system: Rearrange All Goods, Remove 3 Goods, Recall One Good
Daily Missions with cash rewards (e.g., Play 120 minutes → earn $5)
Watch ads to earn bonus coins (+30 per ad)
Multiple payout methods: Cash App, PayPal, Amazon, Walmart, DoorDash, Target, LEGO gift cards
Progress bar showing level completion percentage (97.4%)
publicApiSurface: Cash Out flow (balance → payout method selection → reward)
Props: Recall One Good of Your Choice
Coin spend on props (100 coins per prop)
Gift card redemption: Cash App, PayPal, Amazon, Walmart, DoorDash, Target, LEGO
